title: T-015 — Lane list + detail UI (ms_lanes_list, ms_lane_detail) — MS-100 §10A
prompt:
# T-015 — Lane list + detail UI

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10A (Transport Lanes), §10C MS-100/MS-100a UI surfaces table
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype list: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/ist-screens.jsx:492-548 (ms_lanes_list)
Prototype detail: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/ist-screens.jsx:551-672 (ms_lane_detail)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §ms_lanes_list, §ms_lane_detail (BL-MS-05)

## Goal
Server Component pages /(multi-site)/lanes and /(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId] rendering filter table + 4-tab detail (overview/rates/history/constraints) matching prototypes 1:1 with shadcn primitives. Replace prototype's CSS-only chart placeholder (BL-MS-05) with Recharts BarChart over `lane_ist_monthly_counts` aggregate.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/page.tsx (RSC) reads search params (from_site, to_site, active) + queries Drizzle `transport_lanes` with health computed view; passes data to client LanesClient.
2. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/page.tsx (RSC) — 4 tabs via shadcn Tabs: Overview (definition cards), Rates (transport_lane_rate_cards table with Add/Approve/Reject/Delete row actions), History (Recharts BarChart from last 12 months IST counts), Constraints (hazmat/cold_chain/customs/max_weight read-only display + Edit button → opens LaneCreateModal).
3. RTL test + Playwright parity test verifying 4 cards/tabs match prototype lines.
4. Empty/loading/error/permission states all rendered per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/_components/lanes-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/_components/lane-detail-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/_components/lane-history-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/_components/__tests__/lanes-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/_components/__tests__/lane-detail-tabs.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/ist-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given /(multi-site)/lanes is loaded, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/ist-screens.jsx:492-548 (ms_lanes_list), then page has the same filter bar (from_site, to_site, active), same table columns (Lane code, From, To, Mode, Carriers, Lane Health badge, Rate Cards count), same row actions (Edit lane Admin-only, Upload Rate Card) — verified by RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
2. Given /(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId] is loaded, when compared to ist-screens.jsx:551-672 (ms_lane_detail), then 4 tabs (Overview, Rates, History, Constraints) match, History tab renders Recharts BarChart (BL-MS-05 fix), Rates tab table shows carrier/type/rate/currency/effective_from/approval_status badges.
3. Given user has role=planner (not admin), when /(multi-site)/lanes loads, then Edit lane buttons are not rendered (Server Component permission gate, not client-side hidden).
4. Given the lane has no rate cards, when Rates tab loads, then empty state per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md (Add Rate Card CTA + empty illustration).
5. Given Deactivate button is clicked on a lane with in-transit ISTs, when the action runs, then 409 V-MS-29 (lane deactivate blocked) error toast appears and lane remains active.
6. Given URL ?from_site=siteX, when page renders, then table is filtered to lanes with from_site_id=siteX.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity test (list page + detail tabs) + Playwright trace asserting visual structural match against prototype line ranges before pages exist.
- Empty/loading/error/permission states asserted per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes' + Playwright lane-parity.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/ist-screens.jsx:492-548 (ms_lanes_list) and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/ist-screens.jsx:551-672 (ms_lane_detail).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives per translation-notes-multi-site.md.
- Do not use HTML <select> instead of shadcn Select.
- Do not implement the CSS-only chart placeholder — BL-MS-05 requires real Recharts.
- Do not let Edit/Deactivate buttons render for non-admin users client-side only — Server Component permission gate (UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md).
- Do not allow Deactivate when in-transit ISTs reference the lane — V-MS-29 server-side check.
